Our work

Shipped. In production.
Working.

30+ client projects — all live, all delivering measurable results. No mockups, no demos, no stock photography.

Industry
Tech stack
Real EstateAIAutomationCRM

Bayut Premium AI Connector

Real estate broker · Dubai, UAE

A Dubai real estate broker listing properties on Bayut was losing high-intent leads to slow response times. Agents averaged 4 hours to reply to WhatsApp enquiries — manually checking internal inventory.

Programmatic lead response from live inventoryCase study →
TravelCustom DevAutomation

AeroLink

Private jet charter · Europe

A European private jet charter operator was handling every booking step manually — availability checks, pricing, contract generation, and payment follow-up. Growth was blocked because each new booking consumed disproportionate ops time.

All manual booking work eliminatedCase study →
Real EstateDigital TransformationCRM

RE/MAX Gulf

Real estate brokerage · Dubai, UAE

RE/MAX Gulf's brokers were working across HubSpot, WhatsApp, email, and two portal feeds with no unified view of pipeline. Deals were slipping between systems and management had no reliable reporting.

$2.1M pipeline added in 90 daysCase study →
Custom DevAccountingCRM

Tergo Business Suite

Professional services · Romania

Romanian professional services firms needed a unified system for billing hour tracking, client management, and invoice production compliant with local fiscal requirements. Existing tools were disconnected.

Full accounting & CRM suite with SharePoint-connected invoicingCase study →
TravelAutomationIoT

LuxStay

Short-term rentals · Portugal

A Portuguese short-term rental operator was managing listings across Airbnb, Booking.com, and direct bookings with manual calendar sync. Double-bookings happened every fortnight and each one cost hours to resolve.

Calendar sync errors eliminated completelyCase study →
AgricultureIoTAutomation

GreenField Farms

Crop monitoring · Romania

GreenField Farms had no automated monitoring for their 8 crop zones. Soil moisture failures, frost events, and pest pressure were identified through manual field walks — too late to prevent damage.

3 critical crop failures prevented in first seasonCase study →
FinanceAIAutomation

GetFastClaim

Insurance claims · United Kingdom

A UK insurance claims handler was manually extracting data from 200+ PDF documents per day — policy numbers, damage estimates, claimant details — into their internal system. Errors were frequent and the team was at capacity.

Manual document entry fully eliminatedCase study →
LegalAIAutomation

Law Nexus

Law firm · Milan, Italy

Nexus Law's team was tracking 300+ contract renewal and filing deadlines across a spreadsheet maintained by one associate. Two near-misses in a quarter made clear the system was one person leaving away from failure.

Zero contract renewals missed since launchCase study →
Real EstateAutomationCustom Dev

PropTrack

Property tech · Singapore

A Singapore property tech company was pushing listings to 8 regional portals manually. Mismatched prices, outdated availability, and missing images appeared on portals 24–48 hours after changes.

Listing sync errors dropped to zeroCase study →
IndustrialIoTAutomation

AquaPure Industries

Water treatment plant · Romania

AquaPure's treatment plant relied on a single on-call engineer to monitor process health. Anomalies in chemical dosing, flow rates, and pressure were discovered during shift handovers — sometimes hours after they began.

Alert-to-response time under 3 minutesCase study →
HealthcareAIAutomation

MedRecord AI

Healthcare provider · Italy

An Italian healthcare provider was manually processing 500+ patient intake forms, referral letters, and lab results per day. The administrative team was overwhelmed and document-to-system lag was causing delays in care coordination.

Document processing time cut by 80%Case study →
AgricultureWebCustom Dev

Novatex Italia

Agricultural machinery · Italy

Novatex Italia's sales team was fielding hundreds of spec and pricing enquiries by phone and email — all answerable by their catalogues, which customers found impossible to navigate on the web.

Interactive bale configurator live on novatexitalia.itCase study →
AgricultureWebCustom Dev

Agri Novatex Worldwide

Agricultural machinery · Multi-market

Agri Novatex needed a scalable web presence across six markets — South Africa, UK, Australia, Romania, Italy, and the UAE — each requiring localised content, currency, and a bale yield calculator.

6 localised market websites with bale calculatorsCase study →
Custom DevWebAutomation

Deigma

B2B systems supplier · Italy

Deigma's B2B clients needed to configure complex technical systems before requesting a quote, but the process required back-and-forth emails with the technical team. Each configuration cycle averaged 3 days.

Complex system configurator live at deigma.itCase study →
LogisticsCustom DevAutomation

SupplyLink

Manufacturing · Romania

A Romanian manufacturer was producing customer quotes manually — pulling specs from one system, pricing from another, and formatting in Word. Each quote took up to 5 days and errors were common.

Quote turnaround from 5 days to 6 hoursCase study →
HRAutomationCRM

TalentFlow

HR platform · Multi-market

A multi-market HR platform's onboarding process required HR, IT, and the line manager to each complete manual steps across 6 separate systems. New hires routinely started without access to tools.

New hire setup time from 2 days to 45 minutesCase study →
TravelCustom DevAutomation

SkyRoute

Flight operations · Switzerland

A Swiss flight operations company was scheduling crew, aircraft, and ground services across a mix of spreadsheets and email threads. Conflicts were discovered at the last minute and resolving them required hours of coordinator time.

All manual scheduling work eliminatedCase study →
Custom DevMobileWeb

Ranjet — Restaurants & App

Restaurant group · Multi-market

Ranjet's restaurant group was taking reservations through third-party platforms that charged per-cover fees and gave no ownership of guest data. There was no branded mobile presence.

Native iOS & Android app with direct reservationsCase study →
Our engineers

Built by people
who ship.

No junior teams, no outsourcing, no account managers between you and the work. Every system on this page was designed and built by our core team — senior full-stack engineers, AI architects, and automation specialists who have shipped production systems across four continents.

We don't hand off to a delivery team after the sale. The same people who scope your project build it, QA it, and hand it over to you.

Projects shipped

Countries delivered
